examples: In addition, the origin of goatpox cells and the significance of intracytoplasmic inclusion bodies were discussed.
The characteristic clinical symptoms and pathological changes of goatpox were found in all goats inoculated virulent goatpox virus.
The goatpox cells and the goatpox intracytoplasmic eosinophilic inclusion bodies were considered as the characteristic pathological changes of goatpox.
